summary: Add pp:happy-args to framework teach/teach-pattern/teach-playbook/playbook-amend, honor explicit --json on teach, and single-line the teach Example so live dogfood can exercise them.
reason: Generated framework teaching commands ship without pp:happy-args, so dogfood --live happy_path/json_fidelity probes exit 2/empty; the teach Example's shell line-continuation backslash also leaked into dogfood's parsed arg vector.
